gdpr.title: Your Data
gdpr.pageDescription: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have several rights regarding your personal data. Use the tools below to exercise these rights.
gdpr.rightAccess: <bold>Right of access</bold> — You can request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.
gdpr.rightRectification: <bold>Right to rectification</bold> — You can correct inaccurate or incomplete personal data.
gdpr.rightErasure: <bold>Right to erasure</bold> — You can request deletion of your personal data (“the right to be forgotten”).
gdpr.rightPortability: <bold>Right to data portability</bold> — You can receive your data in a machine-readable format.
gdpr.rightObject: <bold>Right to object</bold> — You can object to processing of your personal data in certain circumstances.
gdpr.contactInfo: For requests not covered by the tools below, contact us at
gdpr.downloadDataDesc: Request a copy of all data ToolShare holds about you. We will send a JSON export to your registered email address.
gdpr.downloadSuccess: Data export email sent — check your inbox.
gdpr.requestErasureDesc: You may request that ToolShare delete your personal data. Your account will be anonymised within 30 days of the request.
gdpr.erasureRequested: Your erasure request has been recorded. Your data will be removed within 30 days.
gdpr.erasureModalMessage: Are you sure you want to request account erasure? This action cannot be undone. Your personal data will be permanently deleted within 30 days.
gdpr.confirmErasure: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
gdpr.rectifyDataDesc: You can update your personal information at any time from your profile page.
